name: Buzzing Bee
desc: You call forth a noisy spectral bee. You target a creature that you can see within range. The bee hovers around the target, distracting it with loud buzzing. For the duration, the target has Disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks, Dexterity (Stealth) checks, and Constitution saving throws made to maintain Concentration. In addition, the target cannot benefit from the Invisible condition.
The bee moves with the target, hovering within 3 feet of it as long as the target is within 120 feet of you. The bee disappears when the spell ends or if the target moves out of range.
